about.title: About Zero-One Innovation
about.lead: A technology company focused on intelligent robotics and IoT.
about.body: Zero-One Innovation is a technology company dedicated to intelligent robotics and the internet of things. We deliver efficient, intelligent charging solutions for robots, and we build the remote monitoring platform that helps operators run their fleets in real time. Our vision is to provide reliable energy to every robot — propelling intelligent manufacturing and automation forward.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.lead: For product inquiries, solutions or partnerships — we'd love to hear from you.
